inputs.label: Drum Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the drum head measured across the bearing edge in centimeters.

inputs.label: Head Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the drum head material (e.g., Mylar) in millimeters.

inputs.label: Head Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric mass density of the drum head material in kilograms per cubic meter.

inputs.label: Tension
inputs.businessContext: Tension per unit length applied to the drum head in Newtons per meter.

inputs.label: Density Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplicative calibration factor to compensate for material variations or environmental effects.
